mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, department_id, approved_by, visit_type, status, is_id_verified, id_verified_at, approved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM hp_receptions WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, patient_id, department_id, approved_by, visit_type, status, is_id_verified, id_verified_at, approved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM hp_receptions WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND status = 'SUBMITTED' LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id AS reception_id, r.patient_id AS patient_id, CASE WHEN char_length(p.name) >= 3 THEN substr(p.name, 1, 1) || repeat('○', char_length(p.name) - 2) || substr(p.name, char_length(p.name), 1) WHEN char_length(p.name) = 2 THEN substr(p.name, 1, 1) || '○' ELSE p.name END AS patient_name, r.visit_type AS visit_type, r.is_id_verified AS is_id_verified, r.department_id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, t.main_symptom AS main_symptom, t.symptom_keywords AS symptom_keywords, t.pain_area AS pain_area, t.pain_level AS pain_level, t.free_text AS free_text, r.created_at AS submitted_at FROM hp_receptions r JOIN hp_patients p ON p.id = r.patient_id LEFT JOIN hp_departments d ON d.id = r.department_id LEFT JOIN hp_triage_records t ON t.reception_id = r.id WHERE r.status = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hp_receptions (patient_id, visit_type, status, is_id_verified, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{visitType}, #{status}, #{idVerified}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE hp_receptions SET is_id_verified = TRUE, id_verified_at = #{idVerifiedAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SUBMITTED'

UPDATE hp_receptions SET status = 'APPROVED', department_id = #{departmentId}, approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SUBMITTED'
